title: Crystallized Beacons
description: Make Beacons more reasonable with the help of End Crystals!
body:
## 📘 DESCRIPTION

**Crystallized Beacons** turns your ordinary beacon into something far more dangerous. By placing End Crystals, your beacon beam becomes a weapon—burning through mobs and transforming your builds into defensive towers that don’t just shine, but fight back. It’s part strategy, part spectacle, as your beacon lights up the battlefield with raw crystal energy.

Here are the Beacon Control Mechanics:

* **Damage** -> Your beacon’s power depends on what it’s made of — the stronger the material, the harder it hits. And it’s not just that: the beacon’s level plays a big role too. Stack more layers, and you’ll feel the difference as the beam grows increasingly destructive.

* **Range** -> As your beacon levels up, so does its reach. A level 1 beacon covers 16 blocks, and each new level doubles that range.

* **Bosses Beware** -> High-tier beacons, like diamond or better, can beat bosses like the Warden or Wither. Otherwise… well, time to _grind some materials, noob!_

## ✨ KEY FEATURES

* Turns the beacon into something that actually fights back.
* High-tier beacons can help to defeat bosses like the Warden or Wither.
* It will protect your base from enemies, from flying ones to underground monsters.
